name: Crab Rangoon #3
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Fresh crab, drained and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the crab, cream cheese, Worcestershire sauce, and garlic salt in a bowl.
2. Mix until well combined.
3. Place 1/4 teaspoon of filling in the center of each wonton wrapper.
4. Moisten the top two ends of the triangle with water to seal together.
5. Heat the oil to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
6. Deep-fry the Rangoons until golden brown.
7. Serve hot, dipping in sweet and sour sauce and Chinese hot mustard.
Uncooked Crab Rangoon may be frozen and deep-fried directly from the freezer. Enjoy!
